prestazioni: Engine: SQRE4T15C (1.5L Turbocharged Inline-4) – Full forged internals upgrade with Manley 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings to handle 30psi+ boost. Stock crankshaft retained but balanced to 0.5g tolerance by JE Pistons.

Turbocharger: Garrett GTX3582R Gen II with billet compressor wheel (62mm inducer, 82mm exducer) and TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegate, paired with a custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe and Vibrant 1799 high-flow catalytic converter for Euro 6 compliance.

Fuel System: Injector Dynamics ID1700x direct-port injectors (side-feed) with a Radium Engineering fuel rail and AEM 400LPH in-tank pump, controlled via Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU with flex-fuel sensor and ethanol content compensation.
estetica: Widebody Conversion: Liberty Walk LB Works Chery Tiggo 8 Sport kit (carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper with integrated diffuser), requiring custom 5x114.3 to 5x120 wheel spacers for fitment.

Aero: Varis Japan front splitter (3D-printed ABS with aluminum reinforcement) and custom 2-piece carbon fiber rear wing (1,200mm span, 300mm chord) with Gurney flap, mounted on OMP carbon fiber wing stands.

Wheels: Work Emotion CR Kiwami 20x10.5 +15 ET45 (front) and 20x12 +25 ET45 (rear) in Hyper Silver, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R 265/30/20 (front) and 295/25/20 (rear) tires, with custom hub-centric rings for 73.1mm center bore.
